name: Mock Cool Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the skim milk in a small metal bowl and set it in the freezer.
Allow to stand until ice crystals begin to form, which should take about 15 minutes.
2. Remove the bowl from the freezer and add the dry milk powder and cream of tartar.
Using an electric hand mixer, whip the mixture on high speed until foamy.
3. Gradually beat in 1 teaspoon lemon juice, continuing to beat until the mixture begins to thicken.
Add another teaspoon of lemon juice, and if desired, add sugar.
Continue beating until the mixture peaks softly.
4. Add the remaining 2 teaspoons lemon juice and continue whipping until stiff peaks form.
If desired, fold in vanilla extract and serve immediately as a dessert topping or use it as needed.
